mapper.sql: id, kb_id, document_id, file_path, file_type, status, chunk_count, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ingestion_task ( kb_id, document_id, file_path, file_type, status, chunk_count, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid), CAST(#{documentId} AS uuid), #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{status}, #{chunkCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ingestion_task WHERE document_id = CAST(#{documentId} AS uuid)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ingestion_task WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

SELECT
FROM ingestion_task WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ingestion_task WHERE document_id = CAST(#{documentId} AS uuid) AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') )
mapper.update: UPDATE ingestion_task SET status = 'RUNNING', started_at = #{startedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE ingestion_task SET status = 'SUCCESS', chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, error_message = NULL, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE ingestion_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
